r8brain-free-src
================

Pinned SHA: 5c44bebe9c477d47b1dc7037fcaae2794ff2b4e1
Pinned date: 2026-03-12
Vendored: 2026-05-11
License: MIT (see LICENSE.txt)

Files copied from upstream:
  CDSPBlockConvolver.h
  CDSPFIRFilter.h
  CDSPFracInterpolator.h
  CDSPHBDownsampler.h
  CDSPHBDownsampler.inc

  r8bconf.h
  r8butil.h

  LICENSE -> LICENSE.txt

NereusSDR-added compilation anchor:
  r8bbase.cpp (one-line #include "CDSPResampler.h" so the static
  CSyncObject singletons in CDSPRealFFT.h get instantiated once).

Do not modify the upstream headers in place. To resync, re-clone
the upstream repo at a pinned SHA and overwrite the files above
verbatim.
